_comment: Merge this into the PostToolUse array in your .claude/settings.json

hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then if [ -f "tsconfig.json" ] && command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi; fi
